questions.q: Explain the role of Indian Railways in the country's economy and development. How has it contributed to the growth of the country?
questions.answer: Indian Railways plays a vital role in the country's economy and development. It is one of the largest and busiest rail networks in the world. It contributes to the growth of the country by providing employment opportunities, facilitating the movement of goods and services, and connecting different parts of the country. It also plays a significant role in the development of backward regions.
marking_scheme: Explain the role of Indian Railways (1 mark)
Mention its contribution to the country's economy and development (1 mark)
Highlight its impact on backward regions (1 mark)
Justify its importance in the country's growth (2 marks)

questions.q: What are the advantages and disadvantages of the construction of the Suez Canal?
questions.answer: The construction of the Suez Canal has both advantages and disadvantages. Advantages include reduced transportation time and cost, increased trade between Europe and Asia, and improved economic growth. Disadvantages include environmental concerns, risk of accidents, and potential military conflicts.
marking_scheme: List the advantages of the Suez Canal (1 mark)
Mention the disadvantages of the Suez Canal (1 mark)
Justify its impact on trade and economic growth (1 mark)
Highlight the environmental concerns and potential risks (2 marks)

questions.q: Compare and contrast the characteristics of road and rail transport in India.
questions.answer: Road and rail transport in India have distinct characteristics. Road transport is faster, more flexible, and can reach remote areas, but it is also more prone to accidents and congestion. Rail transport, on the other hand, is more reliable, efficient, and environmentally friendly, but it is slower and less flexible.
marking_scheme: Compare the speed and flexibility of road and rail transport (1 mark)
Highlight the advantages and disadvantages of road transport (1 mark)
Mention the advantages and disadvantages of rail transport (1 mark)
Justify the importance of road and rail transport in India (2 marks)

questions.q: If a truck carries 10 tons of goods from Delhi to Mumbai, and the distance between the two cities is 1400 km, find the average speed of the truck in km/h.
questions.answer:
Time taken to travel = Distance / Speed = 1400 km / Speed (in km/h). Since the question does not provide the time taken, we cannot calculate the speed. However, assuming the truck takes 20 hours to travel from Delhi to Mumbai, we can calculate the average speed as follows:

Calculation:
Time taken (t) = 20 hours
Distance (d) = 1400 km
Average speed (v) = d / t = 1400 km / 20 hours = 70 km/h
marking_scheme: Define the variables and the formula for average speed (1 mark)
Calculate the average speed using the given values (2 marks)
Mention the assumptions made in the calculation (1 mark)
Justify the importance of average speed in transportation (1 mark)

questions.q: A ship travels from Mumbai to Jakarta at an average speed of 25 km/h. If the distance between the two cities is 2400 km, find the time taken by the ship to cover this distance.
questions.answer: Time taken to travel = Distance / Speed = 2400 km / 25 km/h = 96 hours
marking_scheme: Define the variables and the formula for time taken (1 mark)
Calculate the time taken using the given values (2 marks)
Mention the assumptions made in the calculation (1 mark)
Justify the importance of time taken in transportation (1 mark)

questions.q: A plane travels from Delhi to Kolkata at an average speed of 600 km/h. If the distance between the two cities is 1400 km, find the time taken by the plane to cover this distance.
questions.answer: Time taken to travel = Distance / Speed = 1400 km / 600 km/h = 2.33 hours
marking_scheme: Define the variables and the formula for time taken (1 mark)
Calculate the time taken using the given values (2 marks)
Mention the assumptions made in the calculation (1 mark)
Justify the importance of time taken in transportation (1 mark)
